name: Julie Hickman
body: Thanks for the update. It helps to know how to pray more specifically. Your journey is incredible and I will add a reminder on my phone for noon and 6pm . That’s a great idea . I CAN do that!

name: Judy Nichols
body: I was so glad to see an update from you. I'd been thinking about you all and wondering......

name: Judy Nichols
body: I was so glad to see an update from you. I'd been thinking about you all and wondering......

name: Nancy Rapaszky
body: All 4 of you are AMAZING. PRAYERS CONTINUE.

name: Ashley Phillips
body: I'm so glad you're back in your own home and had such amazing experiences lately. We will add noon to our family prayer time. We love you all!

name: Joni Stierhoff
body: 💕thank you for updating. I will be participating in prayer- I like the idea to establish a time.

name: Michael Dawn Anderson
body: Thank you for the update! We are continuing to pray for your whole family. We love you all!
